title: Chapter 92
content:
Chapter 92: Chapter 92: Mission’s Reward [2]

Observing Selene as she remained entirely immersed in her cultivation, Damon shifted his focus, his luminous golden eyes scanning the air until he caught sight of yet another flashing notification from the System.

[Ding!]

[Yin-Yang Harem Scripture has been strengthened.]

[Yin-Yang Harem Scripture]

[Description: A dual cultivation technique that teaches you how to dual cultivate. A special technique that will grow stronger the more partner users have. Now you can add your woman elemental affinities.]

[Heaven Grade Technique - Peak (automatically upgraded when more woman learn it)]

Absorbing the implications of the refined scripture, Damon felt a surge of ambition and immediately accessed his status.

The holographic panel flickered to life before his golden eyes, displaying his updated status.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Second Level]

[True Cultivation: Earth Spirit Realm - Ninth Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 80, Water: 140, Ice: 180, Wind: 80, Earth: 80, Lightning: 330, Nature: 80, Light: 80, Dark: 200, Sword: 115] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 3,050,000]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider, Selene Frostborn]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Polymorph]

"Three million lust points from a single night of intimate cultivation with Selene? That is a truly staggering sum," Damon mused, his golden eyes narrowing as he calculated how to use the staggering amount of lust points.

The massive influx originated from the sheer disparity between their cultivation levels, proving that conquering stronger women was his most efficient path toward absolute supremacy.

With a predatory smirk tugging at the corners of his lips.

"System, it is time I ascended to the Heavenly Spirit Realm. Make it happen."

[Cultivation increased! Ninth Level of the Earth Spirit Realm → First Level of the Heavenly Spirit Realm. -1000oo0 lust points.]

’Now, I’m a Heavenly Spirit Realm, let’s upgrade the bloodline and physique. Do it system.’

[Bloodline upgraded! Blood of Incubus Lord Mortal Grade - Peak → Blood of Incubus Lord Earth Grade - Low. -250000 lust points.]

[Physique upgraded! Body of Incubus Lord Mortal Grade - Peak → Body of Incubus Lord Earth Grade - Low. -250000 lust points.]

Following the system’s swift enhancement, Damon could instantly feel a shift coursing through his body.

His internal stores of lust were not merely rising; they were surging with a volatile, restless energy that thrummed like a heartbeat against his ribs.

A potent, intoxicating Incubus Aura erupted from his pores, far more dense and suffocating than it had ever been in his previous, weaker state.

The air around him seemed to thicken, becoming charged with an invisible magnetism that would have brought even the most disciplined woman to her knees.

Damon gritted his teeth, his jaw tightening as he struggled to maintain his composure against the onslaught of his own newfound power.

He immediately channeled his newly power of Heavenly Spirit Realm cultivation, weaving his spiritual energy like a tether to bind the wild, pulsing chaos within him.

Slowly, the overwhelming tide of his own desires began to recede, retreating into a controlled simmer.

’Phew,’ he exhaled, the sound barely a whisper in the quiet room.

’So that is what the system meant by the Incubus Lord awakening. If not for this jump in cultivation, I fear I would have truly lost my mind to this lust and mindlessly attacked Selene while she was in the middle of her deep cultivation.’

The mere thought of such recklessness made him shudder; a lapse in control could have triggered a disastrous backlash, irreparably harming her cultivation or worse. Given his enhanced aura, she would not even resist at all.

[Ding!]

[Incubus Lord has been awaken, All Incubus skill will get stronger and you awaken Incubus Fluid and Incubus Dream]

[Incubus Touch: It will make your touch send any woman into heat, leaving her desperate for more touch.]

[Incubus Aura: It will make your presence draw women to you with ease.]

[Incubus Celestial Eyes: You can see a woman’s pleasure point and secret. It now allows the user to look far away and reveal all hidden secrets. The new status window can be seen now.]

[Incubus Fluid: All your fluid will contain and aphrodisiac effect that can rise women lust.]

[Incubus Dream: You can invade someone dream and manipulate it as you wish.]

’Good heavens, the upgrade with my Incubus Touch and Aura is too powerful; where it before it said [The effect grows stronger the longer you remain in her company]. Now the are gone, it means the effect of Incubus Touch and Incubus Aura will hook any women i want immediately.’

’The usage of Incubus Fluid and the potential of Incubus Dream usage also good. I must try to experiment with it soon.’

Damon the summoned his updated status window.

Simultaneously, he utilized his Polymorph ability to hid his true power, masking his aura to appear as a Third Level of True Spirit Realm cultivator.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: True Spirit Realm - Third Level]

[True Cultivation: Heavenly Spirit Realm - First Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 80, Water: 140, Ice: 180, Wind: 80, Earth: 80, Lightning: 330, Nature: 80, Light: 80, Dark: 200, Sword: 115] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Peak] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Earth Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Earth Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 1,550,000]

[Harem Members: Ariel Aquaria, Mio Nightrider, Mia Nightrider, Selene Frostborn]

[Beasts Bonds: Neko [Heavenly White Tiger]]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Celestial Eyes, Incubus Fluid, Incubus Dream, Polymorph]
